title: ARRI Alexa Dynamic Commercial Shot
sourceTitle: Arri Alexa Hm Youth Fashion Smm Commercial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: ARRI Alexa Mini LF dynamic commercial fashion shot for adult model in red technical jacket stepping through a crosswalk, communicating every personality, mood, and version of yourself can exist within one H&M collection. Subject: adult model in red technical jacket stepping through a crosswalk moves through rainy downtown street with reflective pavement with authentic contemporary fashion realism, natural movement, visible fabric texture, realistic skin detail, and social-first youth-culture energy. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Shot on ARRI Alexa Mini LF with 35mm lens, dynamic commercial perspective, magazine-cover detail, graphic-design-first poster hierarchy, and bold wrapped-data arcs, expressive red-and-white typography, motion stickers, and social-first layout blocks layered around the subject. Signature Elements: Preserved arri alexa hm youth fashion smm commercial poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Fusion of Spotify Wrapped energy, Nike youth-culture storytelling, Pinterest trend aesthetics, world-class graphic design agency execution, H&M collection storytelling, Behance Front Page quality, and award-winning youth-fashion advertising. Color Palette: Strong reds, clean whites, realistic skin tones, visible textile colors, subtle film grain, and bold high-shareability graphic accents. Lighting: Natural commercial street light, ARRI Alexa color response, clean fabric highlights, realistic skin detail, and dynamic social-media poster contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Composition: Shot on ARRI Alexa Mini LF with 35mm lens, dynamic commercial perspective, magazine-cover detail, graphic-design-first poster hierarchy, and large red graphic shapes, clean white captions, dashed movement marks, and bold SMM poster modules layered around the subject. Theme: ARRI Alexa Mini LF dynamic commercial fashion shot for adult youth-fashion model in clean white top and red nylon skirt mid-stride, communicating a full wardrobe of moods inside one H&M drop. Subject: adult youth-fashion model in clean white top and red nylon skirt mid-stride moves through urban corner with transit signs, bright storefront reflection, and moving crowd blur with authentic contemporary fashion realism, natural movement, visible fabric texture, realistic skin detail, and social-first youth-culture energy. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Shot on ARRI Alexa Mini LF with 35mm lens, dynamic commercial perspective, magazine-cover detail, graphic-design-first poster hierarchy, and Spotify Wrapped style color bands, Nike-like motion storytelling, Pinterest collage rhythm, and agency-grade typography layered around the subject. Signature Elements: Preserved arri alexa hm youth fashion smm commercial poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Fusion of Spotify Wrapped energy, Nike youth-culture storytelling, Pinterest trend aesthetics, world-class graphic design agency execution, H&M collection storytelling, Behance Front Page quality, and award-winning youth-fashion advertising. Color Palette: Strong reds, clean whites, realistic skin tones, visible textile colors, subtle film grain, and bold high-shareability graphic accents. Lighting: Natural commercial street light, ARRI Alexa color response, clean fabric highlights, realistic skin detail, and dynamic social-media poster contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
